name: feasibility-data
title: ON LiMiT Feasibility Study Data
description: Full data set on 24 participants in the feasibility arm of the ON LiMiT study. ON LiMiT is looking at remission of type 2 diabetes using diet and exercise.

fields.name: bed_q_1
fields.title: bed_q_1
fields.description: Binge eating episode defined as eating a significantly larger amount of food than normal within a short time period, indicative of loss of control.

enum: Ja, mindre end 1 gang om ugen
Ja, 14 eller flere gange om ugen

categories: Ja, mindre end 1 gang om ugen
Ja, 14 eller flere gange om ugen

fields.title: bed_q_2
fields.description: Loss of control over eating during binge episodes, including inability to stop or regulate intake.

enum: Ja, mindre end 1 gang om ugen

categories: Ja, mindre end 1 gang om ugen
Ja, 14 eller flere gange om ugen

fields.name: bed_q_3
fields.title: bed_q_3

fields.title: bed_q_4
fields.description: Eating to the point of uncomfortable fullness during binge episodes.

enum: Ja, mindre end 1 gang om ugen

categories: Ja, mindre end 1 gang om ugen

fields.title: bed_q_5

enum: Ja, mindre end 1 gang om ugen

fields.title: bed_q_6

enum: Ja, mindre end 1 gang om ugen

categories: Ja, mindre end 1 gang om ugen
Ja, 14 eller flere gange om ugen

fields.title: bed_q_8
fields.description: Vomiting following binge eating episodes.

enum: Ja, mindre end 1 gang om ugen

fields.name: bed_q_9
fields.title: bed_q_9
fields.description: Marked distress associated with binge eating behavior.

fields.name: bed_q_burden_score
fields.title: bed_q_burden_score
fields.description: BED symptom burden score derived from binge eating questionnaire items. Derived using the formula: [bed_q_1] + [bed_q_2] + [bed_q_3] + [bed_q_4] + [bed_q_5] + [bed_q_6] + [bed_q_7]

fields.name: bed_q_diagnostic_score
fields.title: bed_q_diagnostic_score
fields.description:
BED diagnostic score indicating presence of binge eating disorder based on questionnaire criteria. Derived using the formula: if(
[bed_q_1] >= 2
and [bed_q_2] >= 2
and (
([bed_q_3] >= 2) +
([bed_q_4] >= 2) +
([bed_q_5] >= 2) +
([bed_q_6] >= 2) +
([bed_q_7] >= 2)
) >= 3
and [bed_q_8] <= 1
and [bed_q_9] = 1,
1,0)

fields.name: vo2max_outcome_v6

fields.description: VO2 max in ml/min. Measured using a graded exercise test on a stationary cycle ergometer with gradually increasing resistance in 1-3 minute stages, until exhaustion. During the test, oxygen uptake is continuously measured using a metabolic cart connected to a breath-by-breath gas analysis system via a face mask. Heart rate is monitored using a heart rate monitor. Visit 6.

fields.title: sys_bp_left_mean_v2
fields.description:
Automatically calculated as the mean of two systolic BP measurements on left arm. Visit 2. Derived using the formula: if(
[sys_bp_left_3_v2]<>'' and [sys_bp_left_2_v2]<>'',
([sys_bp_left_3_v2]+[sys_bp_left_2_v2])/2,
if(
[sys_bp_left_3_v2]<>'' and [sys_bp_left_2_v2]='',
[sys_bp_left_3_v2],
if(
[sys_bp_left_3_v2]='' and [sys_bp_left_2_v2]<>'',
[sys_bp_left_2_v2],
'')))

fields.name: waist_hip_ratio_v4

fields.description: Visual analogue scale. How much do you think you can eat, at time minus 10 min Question: Hvor meget tror du, at du kan spise?. Slider scale labels: Slet ingenting |  | Virkelig meget

fields.name: vas_comfort_fasted_minus10min
fields.title: vas_comfort_fasted_minus10min
fields.description: Visual analogue scale. Level of comfort, at time minus 10 min Question: Hvordan føler du dig tilpas?. Slider scale labels: Virkelig dårligt |  | Virkelig godt

fields.name: vas_nausea_fasted_minus10min
fields.title: vas_nausea_fasted_minus10min
fields.description: Visual analogue scale. Any nausea, at time minus 10 min Question: Har du kvalme?. Slider scale labels: Ja, meget |  | Nej, slet ikke

fields.name: vas_thirst_fasted_minus10min
fields.title: vas_thirst_fasted_minus10min
fields.description: Visual analogue scale. How thirsty do you feel, at time minus 10 min Question: Hvor tørstig føler du dig?. Slider scale labels: Overhovedet ikke |  | Virkelig meget

fields.name: vas_sweet_fasted_minus10min
fields.title: vas_sweet_fasted_minus10min
fields.description: Visual analogue scale. Would you like something sweet, at time minus 10 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget sødt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke |  | Ja, meget

fields.name: vas_salt_fasted_minus10min
fields.title: vas_salt_fasted_minus10min
fields.description: Visual analogue scale. Would you like something savoury, at time minus 10 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget salt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke |  | Ja, meget

fields.name: vas_fat_fasted_minus10min
fields.title: vas_fat_fasted_minus10min
fields.description: Visual analogue scale. Would you like something fatty, at time minus 10 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget fedtrigt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke |  | Ja, meget

fields.name: event
fields.title: The unique name of the event
fields.description: The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.

fields.name: center
fields.title: Research center
fields.description: The research center where the data item was recorded.

fields.name: yfas_overeat_unplanned
fields.title: yfas_overeat_unplanned
fields.description: When I started to eat certain foods, I ate much more than planned Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_eat_when_full
fields.title: yfas_eat_when_full
fields.description: I continued to eat certain foods even though I was no longer hungry. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_eat_until_sick
fields.title: yfas_eat_until_sick
fields.description: I ate to the point where I felt physically ill. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_worry_restrict
fields.title: yfas_worry_restrict
fields.description: I worried a lot about cutting down on certain types of food, but I ate them anyways. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_tired_overeating
fields.title: yfas_tired_overeating
fields.description: I spent a lot of time feeling sluggish or tired from overeating. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_constant_eating
fields.title: yfas_constant_eating
fields.description: I spent a lot of time eating certain foods throughout the day. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_go_far_for_food
fields.title: yfas_go_far_for_food
fields.description: When certain foods were not available, I went out of my way to get them. For example, I went to the store to get certain foods even though I had other things to eat at home. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_food_interference
fields.title: yfas_food_interference
fields.description: I ate certain foods so often or in such large amounts that I stopped doing other important things. These things may have been working or spending time with family or friends.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_problems_overeat
fields.title: yfas_problems_overeat
fields.description: I had problems with my family or friends because of how much I overate.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_avoid_situations
fields.title: yfas_avoid_situations
fields.description: I avoided work, school or social activities because I was afraid I would overeat there. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_avoid_cut_food_sad
fields.title: yfas_avoid_cut_food_sad
fields.description: When I cut down on or stopped eating cetain foods, I felt irritable, nervous or sad.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_withdrawals
fields.title: yfas_withdrawals
fields.description: If I had physical symptoms because I handn't eaten certain foods, I would eat those foods to feel better. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_eat_emotions
fields.title: yfas_eat_emotions
fields.description: If I had emotional problems because I handn't eaten certain foods, I would eat those foods to feel better. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_phys_sympt
fields.title: yfas_phys_sympt
fields.description: When I cut down on or or stopped eating cetain foods, I had physical symptoms. For example, I had headaches or fatigue. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_craving_reduced
fields.title: yfas_craving_reduced
fields.description: Yale Food Addiction Scale. Participant's report of experiencing increased cravings for certain foods when reduc-ing or stopping consumption. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_food_stress
fields.title: yfas_food_stress
fields.description: My eating behaviour caused me a lot of distress. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_function_problems
fields.title: yfas_function_problems
fields.description: I had significant problems in my life because of food and eating. These may have been problems with my daily routine, work, school, friends, family, or health.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_felt_bad_overeat
fields.title: yfas_felt_bad_overeat
fields.description: I felt so bad about overeating that I didn't do other important things. These things may have been working or spending time with family or friends. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_overeat_neglect
fields.title: yfas_overeat_neglect
fields.description: My overeating got in the way of me taking care of my family og doing household chores. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_avoid_no_foods
fields.title: yfas_avoid_no_foods
fields.description: I avoided work, school or social functions because I could not eat certain foods there.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_avoid_appreciation
fields.title: yfas_avoid_appreciation
fields.description: I avoided social situations because people woudn't approve of how much I ate. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_emotion_same_way
fields.title: yfas_emotion_same_way
fields.description: I kept eating in the same way even though my eating caused emotional problems. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_physical_same_way
fields.title: yfas_physical_same_way
fields.description: I kept eating the same way even though my eating caused physical problems. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_same_eat_no_joy
fields.title: yfas_same_eat_no_joy
fields.description: Eating the same amount of food did not give me as much enjoyment as it used to. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_stop_eat_not_able
fields.title: yfas_stop_eat_not_able
fields.description: I really wanted to cut down on or stop eating certain kinds of foods, but I just couldn't.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_eat_more_same_feel
fields.title: yfas_eat_more_same_feel
fields.description: I needed to eat more and more to get the feelings I wanted from eating. This included reducing negative emotions like sadness or increasing pleasure.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_do_bad_overeat
fields.title: yfas_do_bad_overeat
fields.description: I didn't do well at work or school because I was eating too much. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_keep_harmful_eat
fields.title: yfas_keep_harmful_eat
fields.description: I kept eating certain foods even though I knew it was physically dangerous. For example, I kept eating sweets even though I had diabetes. Or I kept eating fatty foods despite having heart disease.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_urge_cannot_think
fields.title: yfas_urge_cannot_think
fields.description: I had such strong urges to eat certain foods that I couldn't think of anything else.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_urge_eat_now
fields.title: yfas_urge_eat_now
fields.description: I had such intens cravings for certain food that I felt like I had to eat them right away.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_no_succes_stop_eat
fields.title: yfas_no_succes_stop_eat
fields.description: I tried to cut down on or not eat certain kinds of food, but I wasn't successful. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_no_succ_keep_stop
fields.title: yfas_no_succ_keep_stop
fields.description: I tried and failed to cut down on or stop eating certain foods. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_distract_eat_hurt
fields.title: yfas_distract_eat_hurt
fields.description: I was so distrated by eating that I could have been hurt (e.g., when driving a car, crossing the street, operating machinery).  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_dist_think_hurt
fields.title: yfas_dist_think_hurt
fields.description: I was so distrated by thinking about food that I could have been hurt (e.g., when driving a car, crossing the street, operating machinery). Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_fam_friends_worry
fields.title: yfas_fam_friends_worry
fields.description: My frieds or family were worried about how much I overate.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_psych_problems
fields.title: yfas_psych_problems
fields.description: Participant's report of significant psychological problems (e.g., depression, anxiety, self-reproach, or guilt) resulting from their food intake. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_physical_problems
fields.title: yfas_physical_problems
fields.description: Participant's report of physical problems or worsening of existing physical problems due to their food intake. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_continue_despite_problems
fields.title: yfas_continue_despite_problems
fields.description: Participant's report of continuing to eat the same types or amounts of food despite experiencing psychological and/or physical problems. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_tolerance
fields.title: yfas_tolerance
fields.description: Participant's report of experiencing the need to consume increasing amounts of certain foods over time to achieve the desired effect (e.g., relief of negative emotions or increased pleasure). Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_loss_effect
fields.title: yfas_loss_effect
fields.description: Participant's report of experiencing that the same amount of food no longer produces the desired effect. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_desire_to_cut_down
fields.title: yfas_desire_to_cut_down
fields.description: Participant's desire to reduce or stop consumption of certain foods. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_attempt_cut_down
fields.title: yfas_attempt_cut_down
fields.description: Participant's report of having attempted to reduce or stop consumption of certain foods. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_success_cut_down
fields.title: yfas_success_cut_down
fields.description: Participant's report of successfully reducing or avoiding consumption of certain foods. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_attempt_frequency
fields.title: yfas_attempt_frequency
fields.description: Participant's report of the number of times in the past year they have attempted to reduce or completely stop consumption of certain foods. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).

fields.name: yfas_other_problem_foods
fields.title: yfas_other_problem_foods
fields.description: Participant's report of other problem foods not listed above. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).
